text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone packs onto the bus, ready for the drive
back to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that was a productive summer! I learned so
many new things!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Most of all about romance... I was so
inexperienced before, but I feel like I understand
it a little better now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I haven't even passed the starting line on
that yet! I just stood around and watched!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite leaving with some regrets, Mejiro Ryan
seems satisfied with her time at camp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Summer was really hot this year, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Things are gonna get even hotter from now on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, take a look at the news!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen wins again! She sends her fans a
beaming smile!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A whirlwind by the name of McQueen just blew
through Hakodate! We are truly witnessing the
birth of a great new talent!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The footage shows Mejiro McQueen gracefully
waving her hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knew it wouldn't be easy to claim a spot in the
Classics. But now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I was sure McQueen was going to show up. I
even wanted her to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But this is all happening quicker than I expected. I
thought she might not make it in time for the
Classics...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's shaking with both anticipation and fear. No
one knows the full potential of Mejiro McQueen
better than Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will McQueen's whirlwind turn into a typhoon?
We'll have to wait until fall to find out.
